mermaidSyntax:
classDiagram
    class SequenceData {
        +String fastq_files
        +float quality_scores
        +int read_length
        +trim_adapters()
        +filter_quality()
    }
    class Aligner {
        +String reference_genome
        +String index_path
        +align(SequenceData)
        +generate_bam()
    }
    class VariantCaller {
        +int min_quality
        +int min_depth
        +call_variants(bam_file)
        +filter_variants()
    }
    class Annotation {
        +String database
        +String version
        +annotate_variants(vcf_file)
        +predict_impact()
    }
    class QualityReport {
        +dict metrics
        +float pass_threshold
        +generate_report()
        +visualize()
    }
    
    SequenceData ..> Aligner : uses
    Aligner ..> VariantCaller : produces BAM
    VariantCaller ..> Annotation : produces VCF
    QualityReport o-- SequenceData : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- Aligner : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- VariantCaller : aggregates
    QualityReport o-- Annotation : aggregates
